novel_features.name: Headless backtest runner
novel_features.description: Generates the MT5 strategy-tester .ini file, launches terminal64.exe in shutdown-after-test mode, then locates and parses the HTML report. No Strategy Tester UI involvement.

novel_features.name: Batch test grid
novel_features.description: Run many EAs across many symbols/timeframes/inputs sequentially with defaults+overrides, ranked output, top-performer summary.

novel_features.name: Set file support
novel_features.description: Parse/write MT5 .set files preserving optimization ranges (value||start||step||stop||Y/N); apply per-run --input overrides without losing the range.

novel_features.name: Named terminal profiles
novel_features.description: Manage multiple MT5 terminals (different brokers, portable installs) and switch between them per backtest with --profile.

novel_features.name: MQL5 compiler wrapper
novel_features.description: Invokes metaeditor64.exe to produce .ex5 from .mq5 sources with custom include paths.

novel_features.name: Report parser
novel_features.description: Parse MT5 HTML strategy tester reports into text/JSON/CSV: net profit, profit factor, Sharpe, drawdown, win rate, trade count.
